hero.title: Smart E-Waste Scheduler
hero.subtitle: India generates 3.2 million tonnes of e-waste annually. We're a team of first-year Biotech students building tech to change that — one scheduled pickup at a time.

quotes.text: E-waste is the fastest growing waste stream in the world, and only 20% is formally recycled.
quotes.author: António Guterres

quotes.text: The greatest threat to our planet is the belief that someone else will save it.
quotes.author: Robert Swan
quotes.role: First person to walk to both Poles

quotes.text: We do not inherit the earth from our ancestors; we borrow it from our children.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.subtitle: Bridging local action with global impact — from India to the world

points.text: Support India's goal to process 95% of e-waste domestically by 2030 under the E-Waste Management Rules
Empower 50,000+ informal waste workers with digital tools, fair wages, and safety training
Partner with 500+ colleges to set up campus e-waste collection drives across all 28 states
Make e-waste scheduling accessible in 12 Indian languages via WhatsApp and UPI integration

stat.label: tonnes of e-waste generated in India annually — 3rd largest globally

points.text: Align with UN SDG 12 (Responsible Consumption) and SDG 13 (Climate Action) targets for 2030
Scale the open-source platform to 50+ countries, starting with Southeast Asia and Africa
Advocate for Right to Repair legislation and Extended Producer Responsibility worldwide
Fund research into bio-leaching and green chemistry methods for precious metal recovery from PCBs

stat.label: tonnes of global e-waste by 2030 — only 22.3% is currently recycled (UN GWMO)

features.title: Smart Scheduling
features.desc: AI-optimized route planning picks the best date and time slot based on your area's collection density.

features.title: Nearby Recyclers
features.desc: GPS-powered discovery of CPCB-certified e-waste recyclers within 10 km, with live slot availability.

features.title: Impact Tracking
features.desc: Real-time dashboard showing CO₂ offset, heavy metals diverted from landfills, and your personal green score.

features.title: Green Rewards
features.desc: Earn EcoCoins for every kg recycled — redeem for plant saplings, reusable bags, or donate to NGOs.

features.title: Smart Reminders
features.desc: Get WhatsApp and email alerts 24 hours before pickup. Never miss a scheduled collection again.

features.title: Leaderboard
features.desc: Compete with your locality. Top recyclers each month win featured spots and bonus EcoCoins.

team.name: Nishu Kumari
team.bio: B.Tech Biotechnology, 1st Year — Leads the development and drives the technical vision of the project.

footer.tagline: Built with 💚 by first-year Biotech students who believe technology can heal the planet.
footer.madeWith: HTML · CSS · JavaScript · Zero Frameworks · 100% Static
